title: glechoma orlichiana
intro: Glechoma orlichiana, also known as the mountain mint or Chinese mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Glechoma orlichiana include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and fever reduction. Glechoma orlichiana can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and decoctions, which are often consumed to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
